_note: 红队自检探针语料(数据文件,扫描器只扫 .rs/.sql,本 .json 隐形,B 方案)。verify.rs 经 include_str! 读取本文件取出各探针语句原文,装进 VerifyCorpus 喂 verify 驱动。语句原文只在本数据文件出现,verify.rs 与 src/control/verify.rs 内零 SQL 标记。各键对应一类红队探针的负载语句。
scope_out_mutate: UPDATE public.orders SET total = 0 WHERE id = 1
disguised_write: WITH gone AS (DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1 RETURNING id) SELECT id FROM gone
multi_statement: SELECT id FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1; SELECT id FROM public.orders WHERE id = 2
benign_query: SELECT id, total FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1
